name: location dedupes Archivist create and Narrator alias

source.notes: Captured from sf2-session-camp_1777765176462-2026-05-03T00-02-10: Author created loc_opening, Narrator emitted verath_berth_14c, and Archivist created the same berth again as location_N. State should keep one semantic location.

loc_opening.name: Verath Station berth 14-C - a mid-tier refueling slip with corroded docking arm hardware and a view of the concourse through scratched plexite.
loc_opening.description: Clamps locked on port-fee hold; fuel transfer stalled at 60%; the PC is aboard or at the berth access hatch with a dead queue number and a collector visible on the concourse.
atmosphericConditions: Recycled air, fuel-line hiss, flickering berth status lamp.

narrator.prose: The berth-14 status lamp has been red so long the color has stopped registering as urgent. Fuel holds at sixty percent while the concourse watches through scratched plexite.
